forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy. High near 50, with temperatures falling to around 46 in the afternoon. West wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Partly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 8pm. Partly cloudy. Low around 26, with temperatures rising to around 28 overnight. Northwest wind 6 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
